name: system-prompts-and-models-of-ai-tools

It serves as a resource for developers and AI enthusiasts to understand how these tools are configured and to potentially reuse or learn from the prompts.

name: claude-code
tagline: An agentic coding tool that lives in your terminal, understands your codebase, and helps you code faster through natural language commands.
description: Claude Code is an agentic coding tool that reads your codebase, edits files, runs commands, and integrates with your development tools. It is available in your terminal, IDE, desktop app, and browser, enabling developers to execute routine tasks, explain complex code, and handle git workflows through natural language commands.

name: markitdown

name: deer-flow
tagline: Open-source framework for building long-horizon super agents that research, code, and create.
description: DeerFlow is an open-source framework by ByteDance for building super agents capable of handling complex, long-horizon tasks. It leverages sandboxes, memories, tools, skills, subagents, and a message gateway to automate research, coding, and content creation. Ideal for developers and researchers building advanced AI agent systems.

features: Full open-source code under MIT license
Long-horizon task handling from minutes to hours

tagline: The largest open-source collection of pre-built components for Claude Code.

name: Gerbil

name: Colanode,
tagline: Open-source, local-first alternative to Slack and Notion for data control.
description: Colanode is an open-source, local-first platform that combines team communication and knowledge management, giving users full control over their data. It serves as an alternative to Slack and Notion, focusing on privacy and self-hosting.

name: Onlook

description: Onlook is an open-source, AI-first design tool that allows designers to visually build, style, and edit React applications. It aims to be the 'Cursor for Designers', leveraging AI to streamline the design-to-code workflow.

name: InstantDB
tagline: The best backend for AI-coded apps, providing auth, permissions, storage, presence, and streams.
description: InstantDB is a backend platform designed for AI-coded apps, offering essential features like authentication, permissions, storage, presence, and streams. It aims to simplify app development by providing a comprehensive backend solution out of the box.

name: Langfuse
tagline: Open source LLM engineering platform for observability, evaluation, and prompt management.
description: Langfuse is an open source LLM engineering platform that provides observability, metrics, evaluations, prompt management, a playground, and datasets. It integrates with OpenTelemetry, Langchain, OpenAI SDK, LiteLLM, and more, making it suitable for developers building and monitoring LLM applications.

features: Managed cloud with free tier and paid plans

name: Axilla
tagline: The TypeScript framework for AI development.
description: Axilla is a TypeScript framework designed for AI development, providing tools and abstractions to build AI-powered applications. It targets developers looking to integrate AI capabilities into their TypeScript projects.
